Privacy Policy

Glan Pickleball Community — BMJ Court • Effective: April 30, 2026

1. Who We Are

Glan Pickleball Community (BMJ Court) operates this online court booking system. We are the data controller responsible for your personal information.

2. Data We Collect

When you make a booking, we collect:

  • Full name — to identify your reservation
  • Phone number — for booking confirmation and communication
  • Payment receipt photo — to verify your payment (GCash / BDO)

3. Why We Collect It

Your data is used solely for court booking management: processing your reservation, verifying payment, and contacting you about your booking. We do not use it for marketing.

4. How We Store It

Booking records are stored in Supabase, a secure cloud database with encryption at rest and in transit. Payment receipt images are hosted via ImgBB. We do not sell or share your data with third parties beyond these service providers.

5. How Long We Keep It

Booking records are kept for operational and dispute resolution purposes. You may request deletion at any time (see Section 7).

6. Your Rights Under RA 10173

Under the Philippine Data Privacy Act of 2012, you have the right to:

  • Be informed about how your data is used
  • Access a copy of your personal data we hold
  • Correct inaccurate or outdated information
  • Request deletion or blocking of your data
  • Object to the processing of your data

7. Contact Us

For data access, correction, or deletion requests, contact us at:
brendonjaze07@gmail.com
